en.summaryP1: Professional with solid experience in web development since 2007, working on projects for large and small companies. Focused on continuous improvement, I have a proven track record in optimizing development processes and time management.
en.summaryP2: My career includes delivering solutions for major national and international players, such as TV Globo, TIVIT, Ricoh Brasil, and CIBC Capital Markets. I have also worked in companies across various segments such as Windsor Hotels, FINK, Brasas, and Takoda Data Centers.
en.metaTitle: Vinicius do Canto | Senior Front-end Developer & DevOps
en.metaDesc: Senior Front-end Developer with vast experience in large projects, bridging agile development and DevOps.

experiences.title: Senior Development Analyst (DevOps)
experiences.desc: Working across Front-end and DevOps on large-scale projects. Focused on modernizing the development pipeline to accelerate product launches, ensuring agile and scalable deliveries.

experiences.title: Front-End Developer
experiences.desc: Returned to the agency to lead full development and advanced adaptation of large-scale WordPress sites. Deliveries for finance (WisdomTree), global consulting (Teneo), and social impact (Food Banks Canada).

experiences.title: Front-End Developer
experiences.desc: Continuous development and updates of websites and e-commerces. Technical implementation of WordPress solutions for a robust portfolio, including HarperCollins, Windsor Hotels, Essilor, and Elite Musical.

experiences.title: Front-End Developer (Freelance)
experiences.desc: Partnered with a Canadian agency to ensure high-standard WordPress solutions, integrating new features and responsiveness adjustments for clients such as Airstart and Boys Arnold.

experiences.title: Front-End Developer
experiences.desc: Development and update of institutional sites and e-commerces in WordPress. Projects delivered for CEI Itaipu, Nexocs, Raphanet, and Persona.

experiences.title: Front-End Developer
experiences.desc: Advanced WordPress implementation and customization for a diverse portfolio, including TV Globo, Nibo, Multiterminals, FINK, and Zanna Sound.

experiences.title: Front-End Developer (Partner)
experiences.desc: Web consulting management and full development of business websites. Implementation of virtual stores and strategic SEO application.

experiences.title: Front-End Developer
experiences.desc: Full management of WordPress projects for the international market. Focus on Front-end, Back-end (PHP), performance optimization (WPO), and technical SEO.

experiences.title: Web Developer
